name: unequal_seqs_different_concat
reason: direct restatement of the lemma — tests the core claim that suffix append preserves inequality

name: empty_suffix_preserves_inequality
reason: empty suffix case — tests that the lemma doesn't vacuously hold only for nonempty suffixes

name: different_len_seqs_different_concat
reason: different-length sequences are unequal — tests that the length branch of the proof is sound

name: concat_equal_implies_prefix_equal
reason: contrapositive of the lemma — right cancellation law; if the lemma is wrong this would derive false equalities

name: singleton_diff_preserved
reason: minimal same-length case with singletons differing at index 0 — tests the witness branch of the proof
